title: Provision New AWS RDS PostgreSQL Databases for Dev, Stage, and Prod
description:
Provision new AWS RDS PostgreSQL databases for the V3 architecture across dev, stage, and production environments. The decision is to use PostgreSQL on RDS (Laravel supports both MySQL and PostgreSQL).

## Approach
- Create a new database on the same RDS engine rather than provisioning a separate instance to avoid additional cost
- Traffic will shift between databases during migration; concurrency is not a concern
- Use the existing dev, stage, and prod PostgreSQL databases and add a second database on the same engine for V3
acceptance_criteria: New PostgreSQL database is created on the existing RDS engine for V3
Dev, stage, and prod environments each have their own V3 database
Database connection strings are configured in each environment's .env
No additional RDS instance cost is incurred
data_model_changes: New PostgreSQL database provisioned on existing RDS engine for the V3 application. Separate databases for dev, stage, and prod environments.
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning. Leverages the PostgreSQL POC work from MBT-166. Uses the same RDS engine to minimize cost while supporting the V3 migration.
